message:
feat(fcp-registry): add supply-chain verification adapters

Add comprehensive supply-chain hardening infrastructure:
- TransparencyLogVerifier trait + MockTransparencyVerifier
- TufVerifier trait for TUF metadata verification + root pinning
- SigstoreVerifier trait for Sigstore bundle verification
- SupplyChainVerificationConfig for policy-controlled requirements
- NoOp verifiers for testing without external dependencies

Types added:
- TransparencyLogEntry, InclusionProof (Merkle proofs)
- TufRootMetadata, TufTargetInfo (anti-rollback)
- SigstoreBundle, SigstoreVerificationResult (OIDC identity)
- SupplyChainVerificationError with detailed reason codes

All verification features are policy-controlled and can be
enforced per-zone without changing connector binaries.

Includes 12 new tests for all verification adapters.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
